title: OpenClaw Creator's new secret project...
summary: AI Jason announces a new secret project from the OpenClaw creator involving a skills repository for Crabbox and codebase harness setup. The announcement includes links to a GitHub repo, an AI Builder Club community, and a Superdesign tool.
writeup: AI Jason covers a new project from the OpenClaw creator: a skills repository for Crabbox paired with a codebase harness setup. The video frames the work around a test harness for evaluating and structuring code. Linked resources include a GitHub repo, an AI Builder Club community, and a Superdesign tool.
